title: genomic DNA-extraction
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"33gn7","text":"DNA isolation protocol for quick and rapid extraction of genomic DNA from Chlamydomonas reinhardtii cells. (also works for cyanobacteria)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"901s","text":"This protocol is based on a paper published by Newman et al 1990 (PMID: 1981764).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":72,"length":7}],"data":{}},{"key":"6ij9a","text":"The protocol is designed to be used for single colonies or 1ml of cell culture but can be used for a larger amount of biomass if scaled correctly. Here I describe the protocol for 10ml of overnight culture.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"5365A702EF1C11EBBAAF0A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/1981764"}}}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"3jf1b","text":"TEN buffer (10mM Tris-HCl, 10mM EDTA [Ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid], 150mM NaCl); SDS-EB (2% SDS, 400mM NaCl, 40mM EDTA, 100mM Tris-HCl, pH8.0), Nuclease free water, phenol/Chloroform:isoamyl alcohol(1:1),  Chloroform:isoamyl alcohol, 70% Ethanol, 100% Ethanol, TE Buffer (10mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0, 1mM EDTA pH 8.0)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: TEN Buffer (10 mM Tris-HCl, 10 mM EDTA, 150 mM NaCl) SDS-EB Buffer (2% SDS, 400 mM NaCl, 40 mM EDTA, 100 mM Tris-HCl, pH 8.0) TE Buffer (10mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0, 1mM EDTA pH 8.0) [autoclaved]
Pellet the 10ml overnight culture of your algae or cyanobacteria in a 15ml falcon at 5.000g.
Resuspend in 5ml of TEN Buffer by vortexing, spin for 10 sec. and aspirate off supernatant.
Resuspend cells in 150 ul H2O on ice and add 300 ul of SDS-EB buffer, vortex to mix.
Extract once with 3.5 ml phenol/Chloroform:isoamyl alcohol(1:1) for a few min by vortexing, separate phases by centrifugation for 5 min., transfer aq. phase to a new falcon tube.
Extract once with 3 ml Chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (24:1), transfer aq. to a new tube.
Repeat step in order to maximize purity.
Add 2 volumes abs. ethanol, incubate on ice for 30 min., centrifuge for 10 min., wash pellet once with 200 ul 70% ethanol.
Dry at 60°C until all ethanol evaporated and resuspend in desired volume of TE Buffer.
Incubate at 50 °C for 1 to 2 h to ensure complete re-suspension. (Can be extended to overnight incubation)
Measure the quality and quantity of your DNA using a NanoDrop.
creator: Michael Burgis
